Investment & residency

Buy Property.
Earn Residency.

Golden visa programs that turn real estate investment into legal residency — and eventually citizenship. Compare every program available to Americans.

Entry point
€250k–€350k
Greece, Italy, Panama
Residency + rental income
Sweet spot
€500k
Portugal, Spain
EU residency + passport path

Malta, Andorra
Fastest EU citizenship

Golden Visa Programs

Every major investment residency program available to Americans

🇵🇹

Portugal

Golden Visa

EU passport seekers
MINIMUM INVESTMENT
€500,000
RENTAL YIELD
4–6%/yr
Residency path
5 years to citizenship
Processing
6–18 months

Investment fund or commercial property (residential excluded since 2023)

Perks
  • EU freedom of movement
  • NHR tax regime
  • Family included
Watch out
  • Residential property no longer eligible
  • Higher minimums now

Every 2 years — only 7 days/yr in Portugal required

🇪🇸

Spain

Golden Visa

Mediterranean lifestyle
MINIMUM INVESTMENT
€500,000
RENTAL YIELD
3–5%/yr
Residency path
10 years to citizenship
Processing
3–6 months

€500k in real estate (direct purchase — residential allowed)

Perks
  • EU freedom of movement
  • Schengen access
  • Family visa included
Watch out
  • 10-year path to citizenship
  • Property prices rising fast

Every 2 years — no stay requirement

🇬🇷

Greece

Golden Visa

Best value EU golden visa
MINIMUM INVESTMENT
€250,000
RENTAL YIELD
4–7%/yr
Residency path
7 years to citizenship
Processing
3–6 months

€250k–€800k depending on property location (Athens zone €800k)

Perks
  • Cheapest EU golden visa
  • Strong rental yields
  • Schengen access
Watch out
  • Raised Athens threshold to €800k
  • Healthcare quality varies

Every 5 years — no stay requirement

🇮🇹

Italy

Investor Visa

Business investors
MINIMUM INVESTMENT
€250,000
RENTAL YIELD
N/A (business)/yr
Residency path
10 years to citizenship
Processing
4–6 months

€250k in innovative startup or €500k in existing Italian company

Perks
  • Flat 7% tax scheme for southern Italy
  • €100k flat tax option for wealthy
  • EU passport after 10yr
Watch out
  • Not real estate based
  • Business investment only

Every 2 years

🇵🇦

Panama

Qualified Investor

Americas base + tax savings
MINIMUM INVESTMENT
$300,000
RENTAL YIELD
5–8%/yr
Residency path
5 years to citizenship
Processing
2–4 months

$300k in Panamanian real estate or bank deposit

Perks
  • Panama dollar economy
  • No worldwide income tax
  • Friendly Nation visa also available
Watch out
  • Not EU passport
  • Humidity + tropical weather

Every 2 years — minimal stay req

🇲🇹

Malta

MEIN Program

Fastest EU citizenship
MINIMUM INVESTMENT
€600,000
RENTAL YIELD
3–4% (rental)/yr
Residency path
Direct citizenship path
Processing
12–36 months

€600k contribution + €700k property purchase or €16k/yr rental + philanthropy

Perks
  • Direct EU citizenship (not just residency)
  • English speaking country
  • EU freedom of movement
Watch out
  • Most expensive option
  • Strict due diligence

Citizenship — permanent

Buy Cheap. Renovate. Profit.

Italy €1 home programs, rural Portugal, Georgian old town — how to turn $50k into a cash-flowing asset abroad.

🇮🇹

Italy €1 Home Program

Towns like Sambuca, Mussomeli, and Cinquefrondi offer homes for €1 with the condition you renovate within 3 years (budget €20,000–€100,000 for renovation). You can pair this with Italy's 7% flat tax regime for southern Italy residents.

Sambuca di SiciliaMussomeliGangiCinquefrondiReggio Emilia
🔍
01

Find the undervalued property

€1k–€150k

Target southern Italy (€1 homes), rural Portugal (€50k–€100k village homes), Georgian old town (Tbilisi €30k–€80k). Look for properties abandoned 5+ years.

⚖️
02

Hire a local architect / lawyer

€1,500–€4,000

Never buy without a local lawyer (not developer). Budget €1,500–€4,000 for due diligence, title search, and purchase contract review.

🔨
03

Renovation budgeting

Varies by country

Italy: €300–€600/sqm for full renovation. Portugal: €400–€800/sqm. Georgia: €150–€350/sqm. Get 3 contractor quotes. Add 20% buffer.

💰
04

Apply for renovation incentives

Can offset 20–110% of reno cost

Italy Superbonus allows 110% tax credit on renovations. Portugal Rural Interior program offers renovation grants. Greece has energy efficiency subsidies.

📈
05

Rental yield optimization

10–15% management fee

Airbnb in European historic towns can yield 8–15% gross. Split between long-term and short-term. Get a local property manager (10–15% of revenue).

Find Your Investment Sweet Spot

Tell us your budget and goals — our AI matches you to the right golden visa program.
